def negative_no_schema_validation_on_external_data():
    rule_id = "no_schema_validation_on_external_data"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "External JSON or tabular data is parsed without visible schema validation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
